title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
